name: writingway2
description: Desktop-first AI fiction writing, project management, and local reading workbench.
author: Writingway contributors

scripts.core-test: node tests/core-project.js && node tests/core-generation.js && npm run storage-test
scripts.storage-test: node tests/project-file-store.js && node tests/project-directory-api.js && node tests/workflow-store.js && node tests/workflow-engine-service.js && node tests/settings-service.js && node tests/compendium-service.js && node tests/prompt-service.js && node tests/workshop-service.js && node tests/project-migration-service.js
scripts.unit: npm run core-test && node tests/context-prompt-core.js && node tests/gen-buildPrompt.js && node tests/unit-context-tags.js && node tests/unit-rewrite-presets.js && node tests/release-config.js
scripts.legacy-test: npm run legacy-ui-test && npm run backup-test
scripts.test: npm run smoke && npm run unit && npm run desktop-mainline-test && npm run legacy-ui-test
